title: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) Stock Price & Overview
text: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) stock price overview and financial data. The company operates in the AI-for-defense market with a focus on national security applications. Recent financial data shows revenue of $34.4M in Q1 2026, gross margin of 34%, and a backlog of $281.9M. Stock analysis tools provide technical indicators, valuation metrics, and analyst consensus for evaluating investment opportunities in BBAI.
